title: silene ohwii
intro: Silene ohwii, also known as Distant Arrowgrass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Silene ohwii can be prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil, and it has also been used to create topical creams and salves for skin issues.
